title: Meta AI Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Meta AI in everyday tasks.

commands.command: Summarise this text
commands.description: Provides a concise summary of the given text.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview of a long article.

commands.command: Rewrite this in simpler language
commands.description: Simplifies complex text for easier understanding.
commands.scenario: When an email or document is too technical.

commands.command: Generate ideas for a blog post about AI
commands.description: Provides a list of creative ideas for a blog post.
commands.scenario: When brainstorming topics for content creation.

commands.command: Explain this concept to a 5-year-old
commands.description: Breaks down complex ideas into simple terms.
commands.scenario: When explaining difficult topics to children.

commands.command: Translate this text to Spanish
commands.description: Translates the provided text into Spanish.

commands.command: Create a to-do list for the day
commands.description: Generates a structured to-do list based on your tasks.

commands.command: Find recent news about climate change
commands.description: Fetches the latest news articles on climate change.
commands.scenario: When staying updated on current events.

commands.command: Convert this list into a table
commands.description: Formats a list of items into a table layout.
commands.scenario: When needing a structured view of data.

commands.command: Draft an apology email
commands.description: Creates a draft for an apology email.
commands.scenario: When you need to apologize formally.

commands.command: List pros and cons of remote work
commands.description: Provides a list of advantages and disadvantages of remote work.

commands.command: Summarise this meeting transcript
commands.description: Condenses a meeting transcript into key points.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick recap of a meeting.

commands.command: Generate a creative story prompt
commands.description: Provides a starting idea for a creative story.
commands.scenario: When looking for inspiration to write fiction.

commands.command: Explain the benefits of meditation
commands.description: Outlines the advantages of practicing meditation.

commands.command: Create a shopping list from this recipe
commands.description: Generates a shopping list based on recipe ingredients.
commands.scenario: When preparing to cook a new dish.

commands.command: Find synonyms for 'happy'
commands.description: Lists synonyms for the word 'happy'.

commands.command: Act as a travel agent and plan a 3-day itinerary for Tokyo
commands.description: Uses persona prompting to get highly specific, structured travel plans.

commands.command: Proofread this text for tone and clarity
commands.description: Goes beyond simple rewriting to analyze the emotional impact and flow of your writing.

commands.command: Create a quiz based on this article to test my knowledge
commands.description: Turns passive reading into active learning by generating multiple-choice or short-answer questions.

commands.command: Give me a step-by-step guide on how to [insert task]
commands.description: Breaks down complex real-world activities into manageable, sequential instructions.

commands.command: Compare [Product A] and [Product B] in a comparison table
commands.description: Automates decision-making by organizing feature differences into a visual format.
